name: openvitamin-enhanced-docker
description: Workspace root npm helpers (npm run npm-scripts to list; conda+Vite dev via npm run local-* or make local-all / local-backend / local-frontend; bash scripts/npm-scripts.sh from any cwd). Frontend in frontend/.

scripts.build-frontend: npm run check-nvmrc-align && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.test-frontend-unit: npm run check-nvmrc-align && npm --prefix frontend run test:unit
